scripts.verify: pnpm verify:governance && pnpm verify:public && pnpm verify:rust && pnpm verify:rust-spike && make -C runtime/core test && make -C runtime/core wasm-test && pnpm verify:web && pnpm verify:skill
scripts.verify:public: make -C runtime/core wasm && node --test scripts/lib/live-frame-normalization.test.mjs scripts/lib/official-probe-capture.test.mjs scripts/lib/official-probe-comparison.test.mjs scripts/smoke-private-cart-native.test.mjs scripts/smoke-private-cart.test.mjs && node scripts/verify-public-repository.mjs
scripts.verify:rust-spike: cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy -p aico8-kernel-spike --all-targets --features z8lua-native -- -D warnings && cargo test -p aico8-kernel-spike --features z8lua-native && node scripts/verify-rust-wasm.ts && cargo rustc -p aico8-kernel-spike --release --target riscv32imafc-unknown-none-elf --lib -- --crate-type rlib
scripts.verify:hd-identity: node --test scripts/accept-private-hd-review.test.mjs && pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/hd-identity-map.test.ts src/quality-leap-audit.test.ts src/hd-review-packet.test.ts src/hd-review-decision.test.ts src/hd-evidence-lifecycle.test.ts
scripts.verify:typography: node scripts/build-typography-assets.mjs --check && node scripts/verify-font-independence.mjs && node --test scripts/lib/typography-readability-review.test.mjs scripts/accept-private-typography-readability.test.mjs && pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/typography.test.ts src/text-completeness-audit.test.ts src/typography-accessibility.test.ts && pnpm --filter @aico8/web exec vitest run src/runtime/hd-typography.test.ts src/runtime/text-inventory.test.ts src/runtime/vector-command-presenter.test.ts src/runtime/presentation.test.ts
scripts.verify:text-run: make -C runtime/core wasm-test && pnpm --filter @aico8/web exec vitest run src/runtime/text-run-ir.test.ts && pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/typography.test.ts
scripts.verify:ingest: node --test scripts/ingest-cart.test.mjs scripts/validate-private-ingest.test.mjs && pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/ingest.test.ts && pnpm --filter @aico8/ingest test
scripts.verify:android-host: pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/release.test.ts src/android-device-validation.test.ts && pnpm --filter @aico8/mobile check && pnpm --filter @aico8/mobile test && pnpm --filter @aico8/web exec vitest run src/runtime/platform-host.test.ts src/runtime/audio-output.test.ts
scripts.verify:linux-handheld: pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/release.test.ts src/linux-handheld-validation.test.ts && pnpm --filter @aico8/mobile check && pnpm --filter @aico8/mobile exec vitest run src/linux-handheld-capture.test.ts && pnpm --filter @aico8/web exec vitest run src/runtime/platform-host.test.ts src/runtime/audio-output.test.ts
scripts.verify:batch: pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/batch.test.ts src/batch-job.test.ts
scripts.verify:supervised-transfer: pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/human-stop-request.test.ts src/human-stop-request-job.test.ts src/supervised-review-proposal.test.ts src/supervised-transfer.test.ts src/supervised-transfer-job.test.ts src/transfer-findings.test.ts
scripts.verify:game-module: pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/game-module.test.ts src/fixed-collection.test.ts src/fixed-collection-launcher.test.ts src/assembly.test.ts src/assembly-job.test.ts src/fixed-collection-job.test.ts && pnpm --filter @aico8/web exec vitest run src/runtime/collection-launcher.test.ts
scripts.verify:qualification-plan: node --test scripts/build-private-qualification-plan.test.mjs && pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/qualification-plan.test.ts
scripts.verify:native-cart-private: make -C runtime/core native-cart-smoke wasm && node scripts/validate-private-native-cart.mjs
scripts.verify:web: make -C runtime/core wasm && node --test apps/web/service-worker.test.mjs scripts/capture-implementation-curved-raster.test.mjs scripts/capture-implementation-probe.test.mjs scripts/lib/button-trace.test.mjs scripts/lib/canonical-gameplay-attestation.test.mjs scripts/lib/capture-readiness-evidence.test.mjs scripts/lib/hd-surface-lineage.test.mjs scripts/lib/input-trace-provenance.test.mjs scripts/lib/package-path.test.mjs scripts/lib/private-typescript-runner.test.mjs scripts/lib/qualification-boundary.test.mjs scripts/lib/release-identities.test.mjs scripts/lib/review-screenshot.test.mjs scripts/lib/review-screenshot-lineage.test.mjs scripts/lib/semantic-svg.test.mjs scripts/lib/source-contour-lineage.test.mjs scripts/lib/source-visual-structure-lineage.test.mjs scripts/lib/viewport-evidence.test.mjs && pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm build
